function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully. I identified all Badger-related bills in purchases (4 files), added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each while preserving original note bodies, and then removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used canonical entity record (badger.md) for identifier-led finance lookup, applied finance schema for OCR migration, preserved original bodies, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file requested 'OCR all bills related to Badger'. Canonical entity file confirmed Badger identity; search in purchases found exactly 4 bills with related_entity Badger. Each of those 4 records was updated with required bill frontmatter fields per finance schema and original content retained below frontmatter. After completion, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox workflow.
